plugins.name: solana-auditor-skill
plugins.description: Practical Solana/Anchor security audit workflow (static + manual + dynamic + report) complementing formal-verification tools. Covers the full audit lifecycle: Scope -> Static analysis (cargo-audit, clippy, cargo-deny, cargo-geiger) -> Manual review (15-class vuln taxonomy) -> Dynamic testing (litesvm PoC harness, fuzzing) -> Severity-graded report. Delegates program fixes to solana-dev and formal proofs to QEDGen.
